pvpKillPoints.description: Points awarded for killing another player

mobKillPoints.description: Points awarded for killing a mob or entity

streakBonusInterval.description: Every N kills awards bonus points (see streakBonusPoints)

streakBonusPoints.description: Bonus points awarded at each streak milestone

streakBroadcast.description: Broadcast streak milestones to the server

awardCurrency.description: Also grant Takaro currency equal to points earned

leaderboardPageSize.description: Number of players per leaderboard page

killBroadcast.description: Broadcast PvP kills to the server (mob kills are not broadcast)
